chunks.title: Description of the Drought
chunks.reason: Narrative description of the physical effects of drought on people and animals.

chunks.title: Prayer for Mercy
chunks.reason: A communal prayer appealing to God's name and character amidst distress.

chunks.title: Oracle of Rejection
chunks.reason: God's declaration that He will not accept the people's worship due to their stubbornness.

chunks.title: Prophets and Jeremiah's Lament
chunks.reason: Dialogue concerning false prophets followed by Jeremiah's description of the coming judgment.

chunks.title: Confession and Appeal
chunks.reason: A concluding prayer confessing sin and appealing to God's covenant and power.
